evidence: The paper reports that "The 2 most important variables in these models in all 3 algorithms included codes for either the correct organ transplant status...complications...or procedural codes," but this observation neither directs the algorithm nor affects conclusions. Main findings center on achieving ">90% positive predictive value and >88% sensitivity" through code count thresholds and model comparison. Impurity importance plays no role in the paper's substantive decisions or outcome claims.
